summary: Completed static analysis of Android Kotlin start language selector feature. All core functionality appears properly implemented without runtime testing due to container limitations.

potential_runtime_issues.issue: Potential null pointer in getOrNull(position) if adapter is inconsistent with options list
potential_runtime_issues.recommendation: Add bounds checking or use more defensive programming

design_observations.observation: AUTO mode and ENGLISH_SPANISH mode have identical language options (EN/ES)
design_observations.impact: User may not see visual difference between these modes in dropdown

passed_tests: ✅ Start language spinner properly declared in layout XML
✅ Spinner initialization and setup logic implemented
✅ Language options properly defined in strings.xml
✅ Spinner disable/enable logic during listening state implemented
✅ Synchronization methods for spinner selection implemented
✅ All language codes and translations properly mapped
✅ Clear conversation resets language selection to 'en'
✅ Mode cycling updates dropdown options via updateModeUi()
action_item_for_main_agent: Static analysis complete. No critical issues found. Consider minor improvements: 1) Add more defensive programming around spinner selection bounds checking 2) Consider visual differentiation between AUTO and ENGLISH_SPANISH modes since they show identical dropdown options
success_percentage: 95% based on static analysis - all major functionality properly implemented
